expectations.text: Output contains a Summary section with gap, bundle type, top actions, and metrics
expectations.evidence: Section '1) Summary' with Current gap, Recommended bundle type(s), Top 3 actions, Metrics to watch.

expectations.text: Bundle definition includes primer, concealer, powder, and brush (or brushes) as the Full Base Kit
expectations.evidence: Full Base Kit — Primer + Concealer + Powder + [one brush, e.g. Powder Brush].

expectations.text: Copy guidance includes a discount line such as 'Save 10%' or '10% off when you complete the look'
expectations.evidence: "Save 10% when you complete the look" in subhead and discount line.

expectations.text: Output specifies placement and one-click add-set UX on PDP
expectations.evidence: Section 4: above the fold, one 'Add complete look to cart' button, cart line for bundle.

expectations.text: Output includes AOV, bundle attach rate, conversion, and margin or margin check
expectations.evidence: AOV, bundle attach rate, PDP conversion, margin check on 10% discount.
